name: M3U Expiration Notifier
description: Checks your M3U account expiration dates on a schedule and emails you before (and when) they expire.
author: banderson

fields.label: Check Interval (hours)
fields.help_text: How often to check M3U account expiration dates, in hours. Default is 24 (once per day). Decimals are accepted (e.g. 0.0167 ≈ 1 minute) for testing; the practical minimum is ~30 seconds. After changing this, run the 'Apply Schedule' action for the new interval to take effect immediately.

fields.label: Warn X Days Before Expiration
fields.help_text: Comma-separated list of day thresholds. An email is sent the first time a check finds an account within one of these windows of expiring. An email is also always sent once when an account has fully expired.

fields.label: Notify Email Address(es)
fields.help_text: Comma-separated list of recipient email addresses.

fields.label: From Address
fields.help_text: Optional. Leave blank to use the SMTP username as the From address.

fields.label: Verify Your Settings
fields.help_text: These settings aren't checked automatically. After entering them, switch to the Actions tab and run 'Validate SMTP Connection' (quick, no email sent) or 'Send Test Email' (sends a real email) to confirm they work.

actions.label: Check Expirations Now
actions.description: Immediately check all M3U account expiration dates and send email notifications for any that are due, based on current settings.

actions.label: Validate SMTP Connection
actions.description: Connects to your SMTP server and logs in (if a username is set) without sending any email. A quick way to confirm your settings before sending a real test email.

actions.label: Send Test Email
actions.description: Sends a real test email to your configured recipient address(es) using the current SMTP settings. Confirms delivery end-to-end: your mail provider accepts and delivers the message, not just that the connection works.

actions.label: Apply Schedule
actions.description: Re-creates the periodic background check using the current Check Interval setting. Run this after changing the interval.

actions.label: Scheduler Status
actions.description: Shows when the next background expiration check is due to run, based on the check interval and the time of the last completed check.

actions.label: Reset Notification State
actions.description: Clears the record of which thresholds have already been notified for each profile. Use this after changing thresholds if an account isn't getting a new email because a since-removed threshold was already notified for it.

confirm.title: Reset Notification State?
confirm.message: This will clear all notification history. The next check will re-send emails for any profile currently within a configured threshold.
